name: BedrockStoreFinder
description: The most comprehensive Minecraft Marketplace directory. Browse, compare, and find the best addons, worlds, skin packs, texture packs, and mashups for Minecraft Bedrock Edition. Powered by AI-friendly structured data.

protocols.description: RESTful JSON API for product data

skills.name: Search Minecraft Marketplace Products
skills.description: Search across 6+ Minecraft Marketplace products by name, category, rating, or price.

skills.name: Compare Minecraft Products
skills.description: Compare up to 4 Minecraft Marketplace products side by side with ratings, prices, and features.
